queries.question: Describe a denim jacket.
queries.sql: SELECT color_name FROM Color_Palette JOIN Fashion_Design ON Fashion_Design.color_id = Color_Palette.color_id WHERE design_name = 'Denim Jacket';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?color_name WHERE {
  ?color_palette a :Color_Palette .
  ?fashion_design a :Fashion_Design .
  ?fashion_design p:hasColor_Palette ?color_palette .
  ?color_palette p:color_name ?color_name .
  ?fashion_design p:design_name ?design_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?design_name_f) = "Denim Jacket")
}

queries.question: Describe a denim jacket.
queries.sql: SELECT fabric_type FROM Fabric_Choice JOIN Fashion_Design ON Fashion_Design.fabric_id = Fabric_Choice.fabric_id WHERE design_name = 'Denim Jacket';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fabric_type WHERE {
  ?fabric_choice a :Fabric_Choice .
  ?fashion_design a :Fashion_Design .
  ?fashion_design p:hasFabric_Choice ?fabric_choice .
  ?fabric_choice p:fabric_type ?fabric_type .
  ?fashion_design p:design_name ?design_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?design_name_f) = "Denim Jacket")
}

queries.question: Describe a denim jacket.
queries.sql: SELECT color_name, fabric_type FROM Color_Palette JOIN Fashion_Design ON Fashion_Design.color_id = Color_Palette.color_id JOIN Fabric_Choice ON Fashion_Design.fabric_id = Fabric_Choice.fabric_id WHERE design_name = 'Denim Jacket';
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?color_name ?fabric_type WHERE {
  ?color_palette a :Color_Palette .
  ?fashion_design a :Fashion_Design .
  ?fashion_design p:hasColor_Palette ?color_palette .
  ?fabric_choice a :Fabric_Choice .
  ?fashion_design p:hasFabric_Choice ?fabric_choice .
  ?color_palette p:color_name ?color_name .
  ?fabric_choice p:fabric_type ?fabric_type .
  ?fashion_design p:design_name ?design_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?design_name_f) = "Denim Jacket")
}

queries.question: Describe the different designs.

  ?fashion_design p:hasColor_Palette ?color_palette .
  ?fashion_design p:design_name ?design_name .
  ?color_palette p:color_name ?color_name .
}
